title: Drazinda Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Drazinda with a Z-Score of +4.40. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Drazinda is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, and the wind speed is 1.8 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The impact of this heat wave will be significant, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and a high CDD value, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
